input: I have an mlp([4, 16, 2]) model. How do I visualize it?
rubric: Mentions viz.ultragraph_svg() for the macro view of all trees wired by ultra-edges
Mentions viz.tree_svg() for viewing individual dense trees
Notes that SVG is always available (stdlib, no optional deps)
Explains _repr_svg_ hooks for Jupyter notebook rendering

input: I just trained a GPT on Latin text. What should I include in a model card?
rubric: Mentions architecture hyperparameters (vocab, d_model, n_layers, n_heads)
Mentions weight statistics (sparsity, positive/negative ratio per layer)
Mentions sample output at different temperatures
Mentions deployed checkpoint file size and bit density
